headline: 3 Reasons OTIS is Risky and 1 Stock to Buy Instead
summary: Over the last six months, Otis’s shares have sunk to $83.16, producing a disappointing 6.8% loss while the S&P 500 was flat. This was partly driven by its softer quarterly results and might have investors contemplating their next move.

headline: Assessing Otis Worldwide (OTIS) Valuation After Recent Share Price Weakness
summary: Otis Worldwide (OTIS) is back in focus after its recent share performance, with the stock near $83 and showing mixed returns over the past year, prompting investors to reassess the elevator and escalator specialist. See our latest analysis for Otis Worldwide. Recent trading has been softer, with a 7.39% 1 month share price decline and a 16.43% 1 year total shareholder return decline, even though the 5 year total shareholder return of 34.43% shows a very different long term picture. headline: Is Otis Worldwide (OTIS) Attractive After Recent Share Price Weakness?
summary: If you are wondering whether Otis Worldwide's current share price reflects its underlying worth, this article walks through the key valuation angles to help you frame that question clearly. The stock last closed at US$83.19, with returns of a 5.0% decline over 7 days, 7.4% decline over 30 days, 5.8% decline year to date and 16.4% decline over the past year, compared with a 7.0% total return over 3 years and 34.4% over 5 years.
